## Meeting Purpose

[Calibrate Marcel's calendar and discuss upcoming client meetings and scheduling logistics.](https://fathom.video/share/yVptfJPciuUS-gBYsCXZwAjQS9VZ-UxE?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel will attend select client meetings (Galileo, Prompt Food, Swiggle, Web3, Carry, Home Base, Reddit, Arena) while skipping others (Strap)](https://fathom.video/share/yVptfJPciuUS-gBYsCXZwAjQS9VZ-UxE?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Scheduling conflicts arise due to increasing client meetings; need to coordinate with account managers and strategists](https://fathom.video/share/yVptfJPciuUS-gBYsCXZwAjQS9VZ-UxE?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Thanksgiving week will be a break from meetings; all appointments to be canceled](https://fathom.video/share/yVptfJPciuUS-gBYsCXZwAjQS9VZ-UxE?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [New website launch planned for Wednesday next week, expecting increased demo requests](https://fathom.video/share/yVptfJPciuUS-gBYsCXZwAjQS9VZ-UxE?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

## Topics

### Commute and Schedule Optimization

  - [May turn off camera and leave earlier during Home Base meeting if necessary](https://fathom.video/share/yVptfJPciuUS-gBYsCXZwAjQS9VZ-UxE?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)

### Client Meeting Scheduling Challenges

  - [Account managers requesting meetings before 1:00 PM](https://fathom.video/share/yVptfJPciuUS-gBYsCXZwAjQS9VZ-UxE?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
